<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Revoke permissions"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1beta1/projects/{project}/roles/revocations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Revoke a project-level Kargo Role from users or revoke
permissions from a project-level Kargo Role.
